g.text: Name: Crop Rotation test Start: 1907 End: 2026 Fields: 3
Define the crops grown in each position of the rotation cycle
This defines the crop rotation cycle. The actual year each crop is grown depends on the field and its starting position in the rotation. Click any row to edit details in Step 4.
← Familiar table format -- all crops visible at once
↑ Toggle cover crops with a simple checkbox
↑ Click to select -- details in Step 4
See how the rotation maps across your fields over time
Each field starts at a different point in the rotation so crops are staggered across the farm.
The sequence repeats every 5 years. Field assignments are generated automatically from your rotation definition.
Configure management practices for the selected crop in the sequence
Currently editing: Dry Peas (3rd crop) -- Field 1
-- toggle ON to provide optional data
Manure, Grazing, Soil, Residue, Economics -- toggle ON in the cards above to enter data
